feed.title: AO3 - Trans Tim Drake (DCU) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Trans Tim Drake (DCU) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Catgirls Can Have A Little Theft, As A Treat
entry.summary:
Author: atomicpanda

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 90,015Chapters: 57/?Kudos: 498

Summary: Waking up as a tween catgirl in the DCU, a self insert into Gotham experiences the thrills of the masked nightlife, fails to combat her new urge to steal, and fails to combat her new feline instincts, all while working towards her goal of bringing good music to a Deathworld. Armed with the power of adorableness and also a deck of cards that hold a unique path to Power, Allison "AlleyKat" Kyle may not shake the world, but she sure as heck is going to knock it off the ledge.

entry.title: Tim Drake's Guardian Angel
entry.summary:
Author: n4tcrack3r

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 51,092Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 313

Summary: Someone is stalking Tim Drake.This would be worrisome, if Tim didn’t know who it was. If he didn’t know who it was, it would be someone smart enough to evade Red Robin, the Bat’s third partner who had wormed his way into the dangerous life of a vigilante, who had proven himself time and time again to be a threateningly intelligent and formidable enemy.But he knew who it was, so he wasn’t worried. He was terrified.Or: Tim Drake comes into (unwilling) contact with an old adversary and has to relive past (and present) trauma.

entry.title: you're a good brother
entry.summary:
Author: DairyFarmer

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,904Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 122

Summary: Dick tried talking to Jason, tried pleading. It didn’t work. Jason was angry. Angrier than Dick had ever seen him. "I knew I should've pulled the plug ages ago, I knew it's what Timmy would've wanted- you people never gave a shit about what HE wanted!" Jason looked like he wanted to spit in both their faces. ---Tim wasn't dead. It didn't matter what anyone said, he wasn't dead. Not to Dick. Or Dick loves his brother. He wants to do right by him. It doesn't land.

entry.title: Under The Willow
entry.summary:
Author: CarinoEresUnAmor

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,839Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 31

Summary: Red Robin, report."Bruce's voice filtered in through his comms as Tim tries to pry his eyes open, glancing around at his surroundings."I-"Tim started, wincing at the pain pounding against his skull. Wires, were the first thing he could recognize, they practically surrounded him, some stuck to his arms through his ripped sleeve like an IV would, some coming down from his head.He can't escape.

entry.summary:

entry.title: ‘Cause I’ve got nothing else to do
entry.summary:
Author: silly_guy83

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,520Chapters: 6/6Kudos: 335

Summary: He didn’t even know why he tried anymore. It’s not like anyone was there to care about him relapsing, or even taking his own life. He tries to think of someone who would care. Dick maybe? But the more he thought about it the more he realized Dick was just too nice to shun him like the rest. Bruce wouldn’t care. He had a new Robin now a new son, a real son. Or: Tim is going through it when a certain crime lord breaks in through his window bleeding out from a stab wound Unfinished, rewriting !!!

entry.title: ‘Cause I’ve got nothing left to do (rewrite)
entry.summary:
Author: silly_guy83

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,081Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 13

Summary: Ah, perfect. “Bingo,” Jason said to himself a bit deliriously. A room had a window cracked open, Who left that? It was dangerous… He groans, reaching for the grapple. His vision was starting to blur. Shit… Before Jason could stop it, the grapple was shooting, his eyes were closing. This would be a lame way to go out again… was his last thought before he was knocked out cold. Or; Tim Drake is struggling a lot mentally, he doesn’t expect a crime lord to come crashing into his house, and life, literally.

entry.title: Tim's
entry.summary:
Author: dodgedriftdietrying

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,891Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 18

Summary: And Tim didn’t really think Kon would try to take Bernard away from him. He was a good man, not the kind to go after someone in a relationship, let alone one who was dating a close friend of his. But the fact that Tim even had to remind himself of that made him feel off-kilter. Like there was something out of place, and only he could set it to rights.

entry.title: “Heron, Whose Ghost Are You?”
entry.summary:
Author: Aaronymous9

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 102,052Chapters: 19/95Kudos: 463

Summary: Tim Drake accidentally creates a baby with his and Kon’s DNA while trying to bring him back from the dead. He decides his best course of action is to fake his death and start a new life as a single father. Or, Typical Timkon Clone Baby AU that tackles themes of queerness, self-discovery, the ethics of fighting crime, and what it means to be a good father.

entry.title: If no one’s coming to save you, no one’s coming to stop you
entry.summary:
Author: artistic_aerialist

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,312Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 111

Summary: Tim would like to reiterate that his family's support for Damian gender identity was the bare minimum, except he absolutely refused for the the thought of Tim copying his (literal) backstabbing demon of a younger sibling to even cross the mind of anyone. He would not be announcing the fact that he, too, is transgender. If he came out to Bruce, the chances are Bruce would get him testosterone within the next month, and top surgery consultations within the next week. He'd probably even organise bottom surgery in a couple of years if Tim wanted it. However that would require the key step of telling Bruce. Ew. That was an unnecessary step. Tim could do this himself. OR Coming out is optional, and Tim decides to pick the option of “let everyone else figure it out by themselves,” so he goes and does his own hrt and top surgery and stuff

entry.title: miss american dream
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,415Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 267

Summary: The biting, frigid winter wind hit Tim like a freight train as he sauntered down the dark, grimy streets of Park Row. His gut told him that a snowstorm was most likely headed their way, but with Gotham’s near-constant shitty weather, it was hard to tell most of the time. He had made the foolish decision of wearing a crop top and mini skirt, only covered by a cheap faux-fur coat one of the girls gave him as a hand-me-down. It barely did anything to combat the cold temperature, but at least he looked absolutely fuckable enough for any potential customers. The only problem was that the dark streets of Park Row were empty as Tim went through his usual nightly route.  Tim had come to accept that he would rot in this sleepless city that he called home, but he didn’t think it would be so soon.After waking up from a coma with no memories intact, Timothy tries to survive by selling his body in the dark and cruel streets of Gotham City.

entry.title: A Cabin in the Woods? How Cliché Can You Get?
entry.summary:
Author: pinkapplepieshy

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,601Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 21

Summary: When Tim's new adopted brother invites Ives and Tim to a lake resort for spring vacation, he can't say yes fast enough. After all, making the long-distance thing work with Tim has been tougher than Ives had been expecting. Ives is sure that he would be having tons of fun, except for the fact that Dick is really creeping Ives out. As the week drags on, Ives can't help but feel that something is seriously wrong here - he just can't quite put his finger on what. DC Noncon Fest Day 6: Grooming | Extreme Underage | Training

entry.summary:
Author: timdrakegivesmegenderenvy

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,452Chapters: 7/10Kudos: 95

entry.title: Kon-el’s Ultimate Guide Book to Surviving Another Universe
entry.summary:
Author: Alphaghetti_24

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,975Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 112

Summary: Imagine you’re walking down the street then suddenly BOOM! you've been blasted into a new universe. Yeah right! As if! Well… not as if for Kon. He’s really gonna kick himself later for this… Nevertheless, he’s gotta try and figure this shit out and hopefully get home before his friends follow him to this other world ready to commit heinous war crimes. He’s really… really… hopeful that doesn’t happen. -OR- Kon-el is sent to the Young Justice Cartoon world! (Rewrite of Skyrocket’s guide to surviving another universe)

entry.title: Illusion of the Heart
entry.summary:
Author: dodgedriftdietrying

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 31,159Chapters: 8/8Kudos: 411

Summary: Part of Bernard wanted to say he should have known when both of his boyfriends had ‘emergencies’ come up early this morning, but he knew better. When both of your partners are superheros who think you don’t know that, families are constantly in danger, ill or moving, work always runs late and old friends are constantly in town. It was bad when they were just dating, in the past 3 months that they’ve been living together, it has become downright comical. There was no way for him to know this particular crisis would involve his own secrets as well.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: The Art Of Internet Conspiracies: The Collision Of Worlds
entry.summary:
Author: Rosemaryy15

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,239Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 54

Summary: When Percy joined the internet, through phones made by the Hephaestus Cabin, he didn't think he, current friends, and friends made along the way, would cause such chaos. When Danny joined the internet, on a phone modified by Tucker and supplied to Amity via Vlad to circumvent ghostly interference, he didn't think he'd make friends with so many chaos gremlins, one of which, he is. When Tim Drake-Wayne made a point to make friends with all the teenage people related to their own massive (blowing up and jumping off the St. Louis Gateway Arch at twelve) issues, he didn't expect valid reasons, more cults, less heroism, and vigilantism, of it's own kind. When Peter Parker-Stark allowed his adoptive father, Tony Stark, to announce his adoption. he didn't think he'd be the chaos gremlin his friends say he is, being more a mother chaos gremlin. Nor did he think he'd meet people like him, err, similar to him. In regards of chaos. Harry Potter finally got his friend, Hermione Granger, to agree to helping him put runes in phones, subsequently getting muggle technology to run off of magic and work properly. Then, he did as any normal teenage does and took to Twitter with chaos.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: 4 Times Jason Mother Hens Tim + 1 Time Tim Pays Him Back
entry.summary:
Author: Dust_Bunny_Meow

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,456Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 1,169

Summary: The first time it happened, Tim assumes he's misunderstanding something. Jason, up to this point, made it perfectly clear that he wanted nothing to do with Tim. He had stopped being outright antagonistic, but wasn't particularly friendly, either. So sharing a snack with him during patrol? Not a chance. or Jason takes care of Tim and Tim is baffled

entry.title: The selfish martyr
entry.summary:
Author: Piratecoreart

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,936Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 31

Summary: Jason wants Tim. He shouldn't have him. But if he's helping, if he's making him safer, then it's okay, right? Tim needs this. The rest, the release, the lack of control. He will get it however he can. But if it's with Jason, someone who already knows who and what he is, it'll be okay, right? Aka: when you both want the same thing but somehow play the guilt Olympics to figure out who's worse because God forbid you just enjoy it.
